meta.title: Lev Context Pack — Agent Federation View
meta.description: L1-L2 graph projection: 5 agents, 4 workstreams, recent mail, content pipeline, parity registry

props.title: Context Pack Viewer
props.subtitle: What are all agents doing right now? Workstream state + mail + content + parity as a single dashboard.

props.content: This page is a **view** primitive (dna/graph.yaml): a materialized projection over graph state. Lossy by design, scoped and time-bounded. It reads agent mail, workstream YAML, handoff frontmatter, and parity entries — then renders them as a navigable dashboard. The data model is the graph; this page is one zoom level.

props.label: GRAPH MODEL
props.title: Zoom Levels (dna/graph.yaml depth_model)
props.subtitle: Every entity in Lev exists at all 4 levels. This page is an L1-L2 projection.

props.title: L0 — Overview
props.content:
**What is this?**
5 agents building a tmux-first graph harness with constraint engineering. Vendoring clawhip (Rust, MIT). Integrating 4 O's + Hermes + OpenClaw patterns. Constraint engineering is the differentiator.

props.title: L1 — Structure (this page)
props.content:
**Components, boundaries, relationships.**
Agent roster + claims. Workstream states. Parity registry. Content pipeline. Mail timeline. Architecture diagram. THIS is the L1 view.

props.title: L2 — Details (linked)
props.content:
**Implementation, specifics.**
Adoption map → tmux-control-plane-adoption.html
Manifesto → trusty-maple-wvcb.here.now
Articles → content/articles/*.md (11 queued)
Parity YAMLs → .lev/pm/parity/*.yaml

props.title: L3 — Runtime (future)
props.content:
**Behavior, state transitions, live data.**
tmux session states (idle/running/paused). Token budgets. Exit reasons. Entity progress. Live HUD. This is Phase 2 — when lev-tmux ships and the scanner detects live sessions.

props.title: Adoption Map
props.content:
Full prior art inventory, adoption matrix, vendor strategy, architecture diagram.
→ ~/.agents/levnow/tmux-control-plane-adoption.html

props.title: Content Pipeline (11 articles)
props.content:
Written by A4, awaiting render + publish pipeline.
→ content/articles/*.md
Batch publish planned as graph projection.
